@All the worries on Earth - Let’s get into it. - This is the first story. Smell Queen (Teen) Hello, I’m Smell Queen, a third-year middle schooler. - Intense. I have a friend. She’s a really kind and good friend, but... the problem is her bad breath is shockingly strong. I’m not even particularly sensitive to smells, but whenever she talks or has her mouth open, the intense odor can be really hard to handle. But she normally says she’s sensitive to bad breath, to the point where she says she doesn’t want people with bad breath around her, so she hates people with bad breath. One more thing: because she hates bad breath, she always carries mouthwash like Listerine and sprays it into her mouth every five minutes. She sprays it nonstop anywhere, so when I’m next to her it constantly smells like mouthwash or toothpaste, and it gives me a headacheㅠ It’s such a hard concern to tell anyone, so I’m sending my story to Queen Gabee. Graduation is soon—should I just endure it, or should I say something? - This is a tough one. - This is really a tough one. - Because the situation here is - I thought since they’re called Smell Queen, @The friend in the story
